DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE ADOPTED AS MODIFIED. DEFENDANT VICTOR HUIE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; AND REQUEST FOR REASONABLE SANCTIONS GRANTED IN PART: A. ANY PERSONAL OR PRIVATE INFORMATION PRODUCED IN RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY SHALL NOT BE DISCLOSED TO ANY THIRD PARTY OTHER THAN DEFENDANT, HIS COUNSEL AND ANY EXPERT RETAINED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS ACTION. Notice And Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael J. Smith, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Victor Huie
Alex Yakolev, plaintiff and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification.
Defendant Victor Huie's Motion to compel response to request for production of documents; and request for reasonable sanctions granted in part:
a. Within ten days of notice of entry of this order, plaintiff shall serve a written, verified response to defendant's demand for production; any personal or private information produced in response to discovery shall not be disclosed to any third party other than defendant, his counsel an any expert retained in connection with this accion.
b. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $250.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael J. Smith, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Victor Huie
Alex Yakolev, plaintiff and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Defendant Victor Huie's Motion to compel answer to form interrogatories; and request for reasonable sanctions granted in part:
a. Within ten days of notice of entry of this order, plaintiff shall serve an original verification of his responses to defendant's form interrogatories. Any personal or private information produced in response to discovery shall not be disclosed to any third party other than defendant, his counsel and any expert retained in connection with this action.
b. Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
